summary: Iteration 3 backend tests: Bulk YouTube sync + Thumbnail A/B tracker. 9 new tests + 36 regression = 45/45 passing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1059 lines — still single-file; recommend splitting into routers/ modules (auth, settings, videos, integrations, thumbnails) before adding more features.
PATCH /thumbnails/{file_id}: divides clicks/impressions but does not validate clicks <= impressions. Negative numbers also accepted (no Pydantic constraints). Add Field(ge=0).
Variant validation in upload silently coerces invalid values to 'human' instead of returning 400 — silent data correction can mask UI bugs.
GET /videos/{vid}/thumbnails has no auth check that user owns the video (single-user app today, but will break if multi-tenant).
DELETE /thumbnails/{file_id} returns 200 even when file_id doesn't exist — should return 404 for consistency with PATCH.
files collection: 'variant' field is None for non-thumbnail kinds — mixed schemas in one collection is fragile; consider separate collections or required discriminator.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is still invalid per CORS spec (carry-over from iter 2).
seed_data_creation: Test created TEST_THUMB_AB videos with PNG thumbnails — auto-cleaned via fixture teardown (DELETE /videos/{vid} cascades). YouTube key set/removed within each test. No real YouTube/Resend/Gemini calls made.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 iter3 requirements verified: (1) POST /youtube/sync-all 400 no-key [PASS], (2) sync-all with dummy key returns {synced:0,total:0} [PASS], (3) upload accepts ?variant=ai|human, defaults to human, creates files record with variant/ctr=0/impressions=0/clicks=0 [PASS], (4) GET /videos/{vid}/thumbnails returns list with url populated and excludes is_deleted [PASS], (5) PATCH auto-computes ctr=clicks/impressions*100 [PASS], PATCH with only ctr works [PASS], 404 when missing [PASS], (6) DELETE soft-deletes (sets is_deleted=True), list excludes [PASS], (7) Full iter1+iter2 regression suite 36/36 [PASS]. Used 1x1 PNG via multipart upload. Code review noted minor issues (DELETE/PATCH consistency, missing ge=0 validators) but no bugs.
